title: senecio niveus
intro: Senecio niveus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a small, annual or biennial plant native to Africa and the Mediterranean region, characterized by its woolly leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio niveus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Senecio niveus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
